_comment: Firmware-side overlay merged onto the generated map by build_map.py. Keys are component dir names under vendor/Wippersnapper_Components/components/i2c. 'driver' = WipperSnapper v2 driver, 'attached' = currently on the bench string, 'pr933' = one of the 22 drivers backported in adafruit/Adafruit_Wippersnapper_Arduino PR #933. Channel/address/jumper come from the generator, NOT from here.

bmp581.note: The only BMP5xx that needs soldering at its assigned address.

sgp41.note: Needs a REAL SGP41 — the attached SGP40 answers at 0x59 but tests drvSgp40, not this driver.

pmsa003i.note: On the string; not one of the 22 PR #933 drivers.

apds9999.note: On the string; not a PR #933 driver.

sgp40.note: On the string now. Shares 0x59 with SGP41 but tests drvSgp40, NOT the PR's drvSgp41.

bme280.note: On the string (already at its non-default address); not a PR #933 driver.

ens160.note: On the string; not a PR #933 driver.
